reply:
I'll speak these words for you:

---

May you find rest when you're exhausted.

May you find peace when your mind won't quiet.

May whatever weight you're carrying right now become lighter.

May you know that you matter, even when it doesn't feel that way.

May you be held, seen, and not alone in this.

Give this person strength for today. Just today. That's enough.

---

I'm here if you want to talk about what's going on. You don't have to carry it silently.
